content.en:
"Nine Secluded Forbidden Pools!"

When Ouyang Jiu'er heard this name, he was stunned for a moment, and then nodded and said, "I know, but I haven't seen the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, because this thing disappeared a long time ago." "

"What's it for?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"This thing is very valuable!" Ouyang Jiu'er said: "It is said that in a certain ancient period of the Haohai Sea Realm, it was not called the Haohai Sea Realm at that time, and I don't know what it was called. Anyway, it was a dark era, and there was a sect that studied the power of dark taboos, and it really fused the power of the incomparably violent dark taboos with certain powers, and then added various rare materials to create the Nine Shades Taboo Pool. In that era, that sect had cultivated a large number of Supreme True Ancestors and Invincible True Ancestors. It can quickly refine the body of the True Ancestor and the power of the True Ancestor, and if you cultivate in the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, your cultivation will improve rapidly, which is comparable to the cultivation effect of entering the Emperor Pulp Realm. The key is that if you cultivate in the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, you can use time acceleration, so the auxiliary cultivation effect can be called the first in the domain realm!"

"The Nine Shades Forbidden Pool is so powerful!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This is a real supreme treasure for a force!

"Why did you suddenly ask the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool? Could it be that you entered the ruins and saw the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool?" Ouyang Jiu'er hurriedly asked, looking quite excited.

Her progress has slowed down now, and she doesn't know how long it will take to advance to the level of the Supreme True Ancestor and the Invincible True Ancestor, if she can enter the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool to cultivate, wouldn't she be able to quickly improve her strength?

"That's right, I entered the ruins and saw the Nine Forbidden Pools. Not to mention, the people of the Zixia Sect still have the prohibition outside the Nine Shades Taboo Pool. "

Ye Tian explained what he knew one by one.

After listening, Ouyang Jiu'er was very surprised.

Judging from Ye Tian's narration, Ye Tian entered the ruins, and he didn't clash with the people of the Zixia Sect, how did he do this?

It's not that Ye Tian himself is a member of the Zixia Sect, but this is not right!

Disguise?

But she clearly knew that the Zixia Sect had set up a large detection array, and she couldn't do it if she wanted to blend into the ruins.

Or did he manipulate a True Ancestor and let that True Ancestor take him in?

But this is also perhaps, once the true ancestor is manipulated, the mental state will be wrong, and it will also be detected.

Ouyang Jiu'er didn't continue to think nonsense, but hurriedly said, "Brother Ye, we must take down the Nine Secluded Forbidden Pool!"

"Take it, just the two of us? There are quite a few supreme true ancestors of the Zixia Sect, and if there is a hidden invincible true ancestor, I'm afraid we won't even be able to leave." Ye Tian sighed.

He was just an ordinary invincible true ancestor, and he could still deal with seven or eight supreme true ancestors at the same time, but if there were a large number of top true ancestors and elite true ancestors besieging him, it would be dangerous.

Let him fight against the Zixia Sect with his own strength, that is death!

"Jiu'er, do you have a way?"

Ye Tian asked.

"If you let me break the ban, I have a way to break it quickly, but if you let me fight, I can't!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"This ......"

Ye Tian was very helpless.

He dared to appear in the ruins, he copied the body of Leo True Ancestor, but if Ouyang Jiu'er dared to appear in the ruins, he would be besieged and killed immediately.

As for Ouyang Jiu'er's shadowless divine steps, he couldn't get close to the True Ancestors, otherwise he would also be discovered.

But if you don't get close to the ban, how can you study breaking the ban?

Therefore, Ouyang Jiu'er's shadowless divine step was of little use inside the ruins, and he couldn't hide it from the true ancestors of the Zixia Sect.

The two had no choice but to fall silent for a while.

And outside.

Ye Tian was still dealing with the Yellow Light True Ancestor, and he didn't leave immediately, if he continued to delay, the Yellow Light True Ancestor might be able to see a little clue.

To go, or not to go?

Ye Tian was thinking about this.

"Let's go, the true ancestors of the Zixia Sect are here, even if Ouyang Jiu'er and I can break into the forbidden interior, we won't be able to cultivate in peace in the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left the ruins, whether it was Huangguang True Ancestor or other True Ancestors, they didn't have any doubts, and they didn't ask for anything.

This is great news for Ye Tian!

------------------

Back to the Terrans.

Ye Tian had a plan.

"Jiu'er, I'm going to tell the bloody general of Black Wind Mountain about the ruin, and with the strength of Black Wind Mountain, I should be sure to take that ruin. When the time comes, I'll tell General Bloody and let you go in and cultivate, how about it?" Ye Tian suggested.

"Well, that's all there is to it!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said helplessly.

Her ideal choice was to completely occupy the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, so that she could cultivate in the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool for a long time, all the way to the extreme of the Great Dao.

But just relying on the strength of her and Ye Tian, they couldn't shake the behemoth of the Zixia Sect at all.

After discussing it, Ye Tian performed the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, entered the Wind King Small Realm, contacted the Blood Demon General, and personally informed the Blood Demon General of the matter.

The Wind King Small Realm, a common space.

Ye Tian met with the bloody general.

"General Jiuji, what are you looking for me?" General Bloody asked.

"Has the Bloody General heard of the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I've heard, could it be that the Nine Extremes General knows the information about the Nine Shadows Forbidden Pool?" the Blood Demon General said in surprise.

"Not bad!" Ye Tian nodded, "I only have one place where there is the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, and it has been discovered by the Zixia Sect, that place is a branch of the Nine Heavens Sect in the ancient era, and the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool is there." It's just that the people of the Zixia Sect are still breaking the ban, and I'm afraid it will take a while. "

"Is the message accurate?"

The Bloody General asked.

If this kind of thing is not confirmed, he will definitely not do it, otherwise once the news is wrong, the impact will be too great.

"It's one hundred percent confirmed, I even infiltrated that ruin in a special way, but I can't fight against the Zixia Sect on my own, so I can only ask Black Wind Mountain to take action together!" Ye Tian said truthfully.

"If the news is accurate, Black Wind Mountain will definitely go to rob it. A mere Purple Xia Sect is also worthy of having the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool?" the Bloody General laughed.

At this time, Ye Tian suddenly said again: "The specific information was told to me by a friend of mine, if I can win the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, can I let that friend enter the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool to cultivate for a period of time?"

"Of course you can, you are also a general, you can call the shots on this little matter, you don't need to ask me!" said the bloody general.

Black Wind Mountain didn't make an immediate move, but went to inquire about the information first.

Although the information of the Nine Shadows Forbidden Pool was not confirmed in the end, the other information was generally the same, and the matter of the ancient ruins was 100% correct.

In fact, this ruin alone is enough to make Black Wind Mountain move.

So, on this day, the bloody general gathered a large number of True Ancestors and prepared to take action against the ancient ruins.

All of a sudden, the storm was coming.

Outside the space where the ancient ruins were located, a large number of True Ancestors of the Heavenly Spirit Sect formed a legion to guard this place, constantly patrolling, guarding the True Ancestors of the Zixia Sect.

Although some True Ancestors had some complaints, the Heavenly Spirit Sect was a force supported by the Zixia Sect, and they didn't dare to disobey it.

And many of the Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Spirit Sect are themselves elders of the Zixia Sect, which is also a secret, and few forces know about it.

Therefore, the Heavenly Spirit Sect obeyed the orders of the Zixia Sect in this way.

At this time.

One of the top True Ancestors of the Heavenly Spirit Sect, the Golden Toad True Ancestor, was guarding this space, and his divine sense was constantly scanning the surrounding territory, patrolling with all his might.

Suddenly.

Jin Toad's true ancestor's expression changed, and he felt a different aura, as if a real great terror had descended.

Click!!!

The void cracked, and a large number of masked True Ancestors descended.

"Damn it, Black Wind Mountain!"

Jin Toad True Ancestor was shocked.

The True Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain rarely appeared, and even if they did, they did not appear as members of Black Wind Mountain, but in other identities.

But now, the appearance of so many True Ancestors with masks must be a collective dispatch from Black Wind Mountain, which is an act that only robbery can have!

He didn't think that the True Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain had come here to play, they must have been interested in ancient ruins.

"Help, help!"

The Golden Toad True Ancestor hurriedly sent a message to the Heavenly Spirit Sect and the other True Ancestors of the Zixia Sect.
